decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is broken after the two April 20 daily positions disappeared without closure records, and the only remaining live position is the weekly 72k dip.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is not clean because `will-bitcoin-dip-to-74k-on-april-20` Yes and `will-bitcoin-reach-77k-on-april-20` Yes are no longer present in live positions but still lack matching closure records in the trade log. Under the playbook, that is a hard gate for any new entries. Binance spot is 75838.9, still below 76k after the failed squeeze, while the only live position left is the weekly 72k dip at 34%, far from take-profit and not eligible for forced management because stop-loss remains disabled. The correct action is to do nothing until the missing daily closures are reconciled.
